headline: AWWA Water Matters Fly-In highlights infrastructure needs and other water policy priorities on Capitol Hill
summary: More than 195 water professionals from across the United States gathered in Washington, D.C., today for the American Water Works Association's (AWWA) Water Matters Fly-In.

headline: American Water Participates in Water Week 2026's National Water Policy Fly-In
summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., will participate in Water Week 2026's National Policy Fly-in, taking place April 14-15 in Washington, D.C. Company representatives will join other water professionals and public officials across the nation to connect directly with federal policymakers and agency partners.

headline: Is American Water’s US$48 Billion Infrastructure Push Altering The Investment Case For American Water Works (AWK)?
summary: In recent days, American Water Works Company, through its West Virginia unit, outlined past and planned infrastructure upgrades, including a US$1.60 million first‑phase project in 2026 and a broader US$134.00 million state investment, while reaffirming a longer‑term pledge of up to US$48.00 billion in nationwide spending over ten years. This renewed investment push aligns the company with industry estimates of multi‑trillion‑dollar U.S. water infrastructure needs and highlights the tension...
